Events

Festivals In 10 days

Holy Week in Cádiz 2026

📅 March 29, 2026 — April 5, 2026 🕐 18:00 📍 Cádiz Old Town

Cádiz Holy Week is one of the most moving in Andalusia. Floats, saetas and the smell of incense fill every corner of the old town.

Food In 27 days

Barbate Bluefin Tuna Route 2026

📅 Apr 15, 2026 — Jun 15, 2026 📍 Barbate, Cádiz

The Barbate almadraba is one of the oldest fishing systems in the world. Every spring, restaurants celebrate the finest Atlantic bluefin tuna.

Festivals In 49 days

Jerez Horse Fair 2026

📅 May 7, 2026 — May 14, 2026 🕐 12:00 📍 Fairground, Jerez de la Frontera

The Jerez Horse Fair, one of the most important in Spain, fills the city with flamenco, horses and manzanilla.

The light of Cádiz, in every story.
